My Projects

Check out my journey as a CS student . . .

Python Django, HTML, CSS, Django

This Django auction site lets users create and browse listings, place bids, comment, and manage a watchlist. Listings can be closed by their creators, and categories help organize active items. Admins can manage all data through the Django admin interface.

Github
SQL

A relational database for tracking fighting game tournaments. It models key entities like players, tournaments, games, characters, and archetypes, and supports full CRUD operations. The schema is optimized for 1v1 events and includes indexing for efficient search.

Github
Regex, Python Django, HTML, CSS

A Markdown-based wiki site where users can view, search, create, and edit encyclopedia entries. Features include entry pages with HTML conversion, substring-based search results, a random page button, and form validation to prevent duplicate titles. All content is saved and rendered dynamically.

Github
Python Flask, SQL, HTML, CSS

This Flask app tracks users ranked progress in fighting games like Street Fighter 6, etc. Users can add or update tracked characters from supported games, and view their progress on line charts. Forms dynamically change via AJAX based on game selection. A SQLite database stores all data.

Github
HTML, CSS

This project recreates Google’s Search, Image Search, and Advanced Search pages using HTML and CSS. It includes centered search bars, styled buttons, and navigation links between pages. All forms redirect to real Google results, and the design closely mimics Google’s original layout and visual style.

Github
JS, Fetch API, Python Django, HTML, CSS

A single-page email client built with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Users can send, read, archive, and reply to emails via dynamic DOM manipulation and API calls. Features include mailbox navigation, visual indicators for read/unread emails, and a pre-filled reply form based on the original message.

Github
